mapper.sql: o.id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.member_id AS memberId, o.member_name AS memberName, o.member_mobile AS memberMobile, o.product_id AS productId, o.product_name AS productName, o.product_type_name AS productTypeName, o.service_type AS serviceType, o.store_id AS storeId, s.storeName AS storeName, o.lesson_count AS lessonCount, o.duration_minutes AS durationMinutes, o.validity_days AS validityDays, o.original_amount AS originalAmount, o.payable_amount AS payableAmount, o.paid_amount AS paidAmount, o.refund_amount AS refundAmount, o.discount_amount AS discountAmount, o.marketing_type AS marketingType, o.marketing_activity_name AS marketingActivityName, o.coupon_name AS couponName, o.coupon_discount_amount AS couponDiscountAmount, o.pay_method AS payMethod, o.pay_status AS payStatus, o.order_status AS orderStatus, b.id AS benefitId, b.benefit_no AS benefitNo, b.total_lessons AS totalLessons, b.used_lessons AS usedLessons, b.frozen_lessons AS frozenLessons, b.remaining_lessons AS remainingLessons, b.status AS benefitStatus, DATE_FORMAT(b.expire_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS expireAt, DATE_FORMAT(o.paid_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS paidAt, DATE_FORMAT(o.settled_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS settledAt, DATE_FORMAT(o.cancel_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS cancelAt, DATE_FORMAT(o.refund_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS refundAt, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM pt_private_order o LEFT JOIN store s ON s.storeId = o.store_id LEFT JOIN pt_member_private_benefit b ON b.order_id = o.id WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.deleted = 0
AND o.store_id IN (${storeIds})
LIMIT 1

SELECT id, order_id AS orderId, coupon_id AS couponId, member_coupon_id AS memberCouponId, coupon_name AS couponName, coupon_type AS couponType, discount_amount AS discountAmount, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM pt_private_order_coupon_rel WHERE order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_private_order o WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.deleted = 0
AND o.store_id IN (${storeIds})
